name: Belmez — circular desde Espiel
region_intro: Touring cycling around Espiel offers routes through diverse terrain, characterized by the Sierra de Hornachuelos and the open landscapes of Llanos de Espiel. The region features both challenging ascents and scenic journeys, with routes often traversing mountainous areas and offering expansive views. Natural features like the Guadanuño Reservoir contribute to the varied scenery encountered by cyclists. This area provides a compelling destination for those seeking touring cycling routes with significant elevation changes and natural beauty. Best touring cycling routes around Espiel The most popular touring cycling route is Santa Maria de Trassierra — circular from Villaviciosa de Cordoba, a 50.8 miles (81.7 km) trail that takes 5 hours 40 minutes to complete, offering a long-distance journey through varied landscapes. Another top favourite among local touring cyclists is Belmez — circular desde Espiel, a difficult 38.6 miles (62.2 km) path. This route presents a challenging ride with notable elevation gain through the region's natural environment. Local touring cyclists also love the Puente Nuevo Reservoir Loop, a 36.0 miles (57.9 km) trail leading through scenic areas around the reservoir, often completed in about 4 hours 27 minutes. Touring cycling around Espiel is defined by challenging ascents, diverse terrain including the Sierra de Hornachuelos, and panoramic viewpoints such as Llanos de Espiel. The network offers options for different ability levels, though many routes feature significant climbs. The routes in Espiel are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 5.0 stars from 1 review. More than 50 touring cyclists have used komoot to explore Espiel's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many touring cycling routes are available around Espiel?
A: There are over 10 touring cycling routes available around Espiel, offering a variety of experiences for cyclists. The komoot community has explored 12 routes in total.

Q: What is the general difficulty level of touring cycling routes in Espiel?
A: Most touring cycling routes in Espiel are classified as difficult, featuring significant elevation gains and challenging ascents. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1027281277/santa-maria-de-trassierra-circular-from-villaviciosa-de-cordoba" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Santa Maria de Trassierra — circular from Villaviciosa de Cordoba&lt;/a&gt; route includes over 1,500 meters of climbing.

Q: What kind of terrain can I expect on touring cycling routes in Espiel?
A: You can expect diverse terrain, including mountainous areas within the &lt;strong&gt;Sierra de Hornachuelos&lt;/strong&gt; and open landscapes like the &lt;strong&gt;Llanos de Espiel&lt;/strong&gt;. Routes often feature challenging ascents and descents, with varied surfaces typical of rural roads and tracks in the region.

Q: Are there any circular touring cycling routes in Espiel?
A: Yes, several popular touring cycling routes around Espiel are circular. Notable options include &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1027104901/belmez-circular-desde-espiel" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Belmez — circular desde Espiel&lt;/a&gt; and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1027156501/puente-nuevo-reservoir-loop" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Puente Nuevo Reservoir Loop&lt;/a&gt;, both offering scenic round trips.

Q: What natural attractions can I discover along the touring cycling routes in Espiel?
A: Cyclists can encounter several natural attractions. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5618335" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Guadanuño Reservoir&lt;/a&gt; offers picturesque views, and the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5618384" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Malos Pasos Spring&lt;/a&gt;, known for its mineral waters, is another interesting stop. You might also find the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3121300" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Calderas Waterfall&lt;/a&gt; and &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/2225250" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Fuente del Cordel&lt;/a&gt; along certain paths.

Q: Are there any notable viewpoints or scenic spots for touring cyclists in the Espiel region?
A: Absolutely. The &lt;strong&gt;Llanos de Espiel&lt;/strong&gt; is renowned as one of the best viewpoints in the province of Cordoba, offering expansive panoramic views. Additionally, routes around the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5618335" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Guadanuño Reservoir&lt;/a&gt; provide beautiful scenic vistas.

Q: Can I cycle past historical or cultural landmarks in Espiel?
A: Yes, some routes incorporate historical elements. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5618350" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Camino Mozarabe de Santiago&lt;/a&gt;, a historic pilgrimage route, passes through Espiel. You might also cycle near &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1219085" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;San Calixto&lt;/a&gt;, an area known for its cycling appeal and natural beauty.

Q: What do other touring cyclists enjoy the most about touring cycling in Espiel?
A: The area is highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 5.0 stars. Reviewers often praise the challenging ascents, the diverse terrain including the Sierra de Hornachuelos, and the panoramic viewpoints that offer breathtaking scenery.

Q: Are there any long-distance touring cycling routes around Espiel?
A: Yes, Espiel is part of the longer &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5618350" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Camino Mozarabe de Santiago&lt;/a&gt;, which is a significant route for touring cyclists. For a substantial day ride, consider the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1027281277/santa-maria-de-trassierra-circular-from-villaviciosa-de-cordoba" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Santa Maria de Trassierra — circular from Villaviciosa de Cordoba&lt;/a&gt;, which spans over 80 kilometers.

Q: Are there any touring cycling routes that pass by reservoirs?
A: Yes, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1027156501/puente-nuevo-reservoir-loop" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Puente Nuevo Reservoir Loop&lt;/a&gt; is a popular route that takes you through scenic areas around the reservoir. Additionally, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5618335" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Guadanuño Reservoir&lt;/a&gt; is a notable feature in the region, offering picturesque views.

Q: What is the best season for touring cycling in Espiel?
A: While specific seasonal data isn't provided, regions like Espiel with significant elevation and open landscapes are generally best enjoyed in spring and autumn when temperatures are milder. Summers can be very hot, and winters might bring cooler, wetter conditions, especially in the mountains.

Q: Are there any routes that venture into the Sierra de Hornachuelos?
A: Yes, the region around Espiel is characterized by the &lt;strong&gt;Sierra de Hornachuelos&lt;/strong&gt;. Routes like the ascent towards &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1219085" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;San Calixto&lt;/a&gt; will take you into this natural park, offering an immersive experience into its rugged and scenic environment.
tips: Villa located in the Valle del Guadiato region. It has one of the best sport climbing areas in Andalusia.

If you go through Belmez, you will surely see its castle, because it is visible from almost anywhere since it is located on a large limestone rock. The 13th century castle stands majestically on the hill, like a lookout for the town of Belmez. It can be accessed by stairs to enjoy the panoramic views of the mountains and even the Sierra Boyera Reservoir.
